- = Not Assessed/No Information

486 FALL_ASLEEP_FREQ_ADMSN_CD FALL_ASLEEP_FREQ_ADMSN_CD Mood: Trouble falling or staying asleep: F (A) CHAR 1 This column documents, at the time of admission, the frequency with which the patient has had trouble falling or staying asleep, or sleeping too much. 0 = Never or 1 day 
1 = 2-6 days 
2 = 7-11 days 
3 = 12-14 days 
- = Not Assessed/No
